company: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.
intended_use: HYPER DLR is an image processing function intended to be used by radiologists and nuclear medicine physicians to reduce noise of the fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET images.
intended_use_full: HYPER DLR is an image processing function intended to be used by radiologists and nuclear medicine physicians to reduce noise of the fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET images.
target_condition: High-noise PET images requiring noise reduction for improved diagnostic quality
ground_truth: Gaussian filtering results used as reference comparison standard
other_metrics: Peak signal to noise ratio, Structural similarity index, Pearson correlation coefficient, Signal to noise ratio (SNR), Contrast to noise ratio (CNR), Normalized root mean square error, Bland-Altman plot analysis. Summary states: HYPER DLR significantly improved SNR and CNR while preserving image consistency and produced lower image noise than Gaussian filtering with sufficient image quality for clinical diagnosis.
